<?php namespace Faker\Provider\de_DE; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { /** * @see https://www.statista.com/statistics/446418/most-popular-e-mail-providers-germany/ * @see http://blog.shuttlecloud.com/the-10-most-popular-email-providers-in-germany */ protected static $freeEmailDomain = [ 'web.de', 'gmail.com', 'hotmail.de', 'yahoo.de', 'googlemail.com', 'aol.de', 'gmx.de', 'freenet.de', 'posteo.de', 'mail.de', 'live.de', 't-online.de', ]; protected static $tld = ['com', 'com', 'com', 'net', 'org', 'de', 'de', 'de']; }
